description: Character registry for cross-shot consistency. Populated by src/bootstrapSoulIds.js on first run (or manually). All ref URLs must be publicly reachable so Midjourney and Higgsfield can fetch them.

pescador_protagonist.name: Pedro — O Pescador
pescador_protagonist.description: Weathered Middle Eastern fisherman, early 50s, deep sun-carved wrinkles around piercing blue eyes, grey-streaked black beard reaching mid-chest, sun-burnt olive skin, rough calloused hands, simple brown wool tunic tied with rope
pescador_protagonist.style_tokens: ancient biblical period accurate wardrobe, Galilean fisherman, 1st century AD

shepherd_protagonist.name: O Pastor
shepherd_protagonist.description: Weathered Middle Eastern shepherd, mid 40s, kind but determined eyes, long dark curly hair, thick neatly-trimmed beard, sun-darkened skin, scarred hands, rough brown wool cloak with rope belt, carved wooden staff
shepherd_protagonist.style_tokens: ancient biblical period accurate wardrobe, good shepherd archetype, Judean hills

ezekiel_prophet.name: Ezequiel
ezekiel_prophet.description: Biblical prophet Ezekiel, late 40s, intense piercing dark eyes, long untamed grey-streaked black beard and long hair, weathered sun-carved skin, lean powerful frame, rough woven wool robe in muted earth tones, leather sandals, tall carved wooden staff
ezekiel_prophet.style_tokens: ancient biblical prophet, Old Testament visionary, wind-blown fabric, 6th century BC
